Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}It doesn't look like anyone's reported him missing yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}So, you guys are helping stray dogs now, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Aren't you spreading yourselves a bit too thin?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Settle down now, Koromaru. You haven't changed at all, have you, boy?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}He's always felt the need to be this town's watchdog. Maybe he got it from the priest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}And now that he's with you, he's more righteous than ever, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hello, this is Officer Kurosawa from the Tatsumi East Police Station.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Well, it was written on the collar... Yes, no one answered, so I called you instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Yes, that's right. A brown, medium-sized dog.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We've managed to identify the owner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}However, they're in the hospital after falling to Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Yeah. The owner's family will take the dog in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Don't worry. The owner's family will take the dog in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Don't look so glum. The owner's family will take the dog in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Cases like this one have been on the rise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Pets are being abandoned because their owners are falling prey to Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}And to survive, the pets have no choice but to take to the streets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Maybe you need to hear this, so just know that you guys are doing fine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I don't know the whole picture, but that much I'm certain about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I'm going to get back to work now. Watch yourselves on your way home, all right?[n]{f 1 1}
